name: Iris — Sovereign Companion
description: Phone-first sovereign advocate PWA for generating, signing, saving, and exporting Burgess Claims offline, with Mirror Mode, local triggers, signed update manifests, and explicit user-controlled activation.

shortcuts.name: Sovereign Mode
shortcuts.description: Launch Iris into the local-first Burgess review flow with Sovereign Mode badging.

shortcuts.name: Mirror claim
shortcuts.description: Open Iris and start a Mirror Mode-aware Burgess claim flow on this device.

shortcuts.name: Crypto exchange freeze
shortcuts.description: Start a Burgess Claim for an exchange freeze or withdrawal hold.

shortcuts.name: Direct debit refund
shortcuts.description: Start a Burgess Claim for a direct debit refund dispute.

shortcuts.name: Benefits review
shortcuts.description: Start a Burgess Claim for a benefits review or dispute.

shortcuts.name: Burgess check
shortcuts.description: Run a quick Burgess check — was a human able to personally review the specific facts?
